tasks.label: start-aspire-dashboard
tasks.command: docker stop aspire-dashboard 2>/dev/null; docker rm -f aspire-dashboard 2>/dev/null; docker run --rm -d --name aspire-dashboard -p 18888:18888 -p 4317:18889 -p 4318:18890 -e DASHBOARD__FRONTEND__AUTHMODE=Unsecured mcr.microsoft.com/dotnet/aspire-dashboard:latest && echo 'Aspire Dashboard started — UI: http://localhost:18888  OTLP gRPC: localhost:4317  OTLP HTTP: localhost:4318'
tasks.detail: Starts Aspire Dashboard in Docker (UI: http://localhost:18888, OTLP gRPC: localhost:4317, OTLP HTTP: localhost:4318). Stops any existing instance first. Requires Docker.

tasks.label: stop-aspire-dashboard
tasks.command: docker stop aspire-dashboard 2>/dev/null && echo 'Aspire Dashboard stopped' || echo 'Aspire Dashboard was not running'
tasks.detail: Stops the Aspire Dashboard Docker container.
